title: Worms Zone .io — Hungry Snake
notes: Chocolate Day is back! Complete updated quests, catch sweet bugs, and unlock two delicious new worms - Donut and Honey. Plus, check out the new offer featuring the animated Marshmallow worm! Then jump into Video Games Day! Collect game discs in the Arena to unlock the exclusive Gamer worm, our first-ever event worm with an animated head! Also, don't miss the special offer featuring the returning Racer worm from last year's event.

title: Subway Surfers
notes:
- Bienvenue to Subway Surfers Paris! Dash through the Parisian streets and gear up for the biggest cycling competition in the world.
- Meet our two new Surfers who are ready to join the Crew: Marie Macaron, bringing sweetness to every run, and Pierre with his Parisian flair, both ready to show off the city in style.
- Get in the spirit for the summer festivities and join us to celebrate Gamers Week and Disability Pride Month with fun events and content.

title: EA SPORTS FC™ Football Mobile
notes:
Play The World’s Game update. Compete in a global football tournament and lead your national team to glory. Experience authentic player attributes with Playstyles that bring athletes' unique abilities to life.  Instantly connect with friends & play PVP in Quick Match. FC Mobile now supports Hindi, Czech & Polish The World’s Game Update also features a brand new nostalgia-themed soundtrack.

THE WORLD’S GAME TOURNAMENT
